title: Mode-Specific Overview Layout and Integrated Development Model Lab Map Experience

overview_mode_state_changes.search_parcel_action: sets parcel mode and expands the parcel helper rail without switching to countywide intelligence
overview_mode_state_changes.countywide_intelligence_action: sets countywide mode and opens the map layer controls
overview_mode_state_changes.model_lab_action: sets modelLab mode, opens Model Lab Controls, and shows Model Lab Intelligence
overview_mode_state_changes.save_snapshot_action: keeps the current mode and saves it into the Planning Snapshot object

left_panel_mode_specific_behavior.parcel_mode: shows a compact parcel helper with search guidance, selected parcel summary, Focus Map, Save Snapshot, Open Planning Snapshot, and Open Layers actions
left_panel_mode_specific_behavior.countywide_mode: shows existing compact layer controls and all existing layer groups
left_panel_mode_specific_behavior.model_lab_mode: replaces generic layer controls with Model Lab Controls, development model facts, overlay toggle, display options, safe legend, included/excluded feature groups, and Methodology link
left_panel_mode_specific_behavior.snapshot_mode: shows a small snapshot helper with saved snapshot count, latest snapshot status, Save Snapshot, and Open Snapshot Library actions

model_lab_controls.target: new construction permit within next 3 years

research_overlay_implementation.implemented: safe UI research-mode overlay context only
research_overlay_implementation.map_behavior: Model Lab mode shows a map research banner and safe legend context; turning on the overlay updates the banner and right-panel context
research_overlay_implementation.reason_no_parcel_layer: No reviewed, probability-free parcel-level preview source was added in this phase, and no data was fabricated.

click_behavior_for_model_overlay.reason: Feature click inspection was intentionally not added because there is not yet a reviewed, versioned, probability-free preview feature source for clickable model research features.
click_behavior_for_model_overlay.current_behavior: Right panel explains aggregate Model Lab context and prompts that click inspection remains unavailable until a safe preview source exists.

right_panel_model_lab_intelligence_behav.no_feature_selected: shows current best internal variant, model question, aggregate metrics, feature groups that helped, excluded feature groups, future model placeholders, overlay status, and safety caveats
right_panel_model_lab_intelligence_behav.feature_selected: not available in this phase because no parcel-level preview source is rendered
right_panel_model_lab_intelligence_behav.selected_parcel_context: if a parcel is selected, Model Lab notes that parcel context can be saved in snapshots but no parcel-level model output is shown

report_adaptation.countywide: report labels context as countywide intelligence
report_adaptation.modelLab: report labels context as Model Lab Intelligence and includes internal-only model caveats

methodology_link_behavior.behavior: switches to Methodology and opens the Model Research section using the methodology-model-lab hash

documentation_updates: README.md documents mode-specific Overview workspaces and the safe Model Lab overlay behavior
docs/demo/cfs_demo_walkthrough.md includes the Model Lab workflow and mode-specific sequence
docs/demo/cfs_final_demo_checklist.md adds Parcel, Countywide, and Model Lab mode checks
docs/demo/cfs_model_explanation_for_nontechnical_audience.md explains that the optional map research overlay is off by default and does not show scores or official classes

safety_verification.unsafe_terms_search_notes: Search found only existing aggregate guardrail/test/backend schema names and an aggregate research-status hook; the new UI does not expose exact probabilities, raw scores, or official parcel prediction classes.

validation_results.backend_compile_or_pytest: not run; backend files were not changed

remaining_known_limitations: Model research overlay is a safe research-mode UI context, not a rendered parcel feature layer.
Clickable model overlay feature inspection is deferred until a reviewed probability-free preview source exists.
Model Lab remains internal research only and is not production-ready.
Exact probabilities, raw model scores, and official parcel prediction classes remain hidden.
